title: Task 3: Synthetic-check hook for rotation window
design: Hook a synthetic check that runs every 30s during rotation window; assert zero 5xx. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/integration/test_rotate_synthetic.py.
close_reason: AUDITED: APPROVED. Synthetic check hook meets all criteria.

title: Task 2: Add vault_rotate orchestration module
design: Create src/lib/vault_rotate.py with rotate(name, new_value) that calls vault.rotate_secret + schedules T+5min expiry. Files: src/lib/vault_rotate.py, tests/lib/test_vault_rotate.py.
close_reason: AUDITED: APPROVED. vault_rotate orchestration meets all criteria.

title: Task 1: Add rotate_secret helper to vault.py
design: Extend src/lib/vault.py with rotate_secret(name, new_value) helper that stages a new versioned alias. Files: src/lib/vault.py, tests/lib/test_vault.py. Edge cases: concurrent calls serialize, vault unreachable raises VaultError, empty value rejected.
notes:
AUDITED: APPROVED. rotate_secret meets all criteria.

DISCOVERED during implementation: the per-name versioned-alias rotation
primitive in vault.py (rotate_secret + the _ALIASES + per-name lock pattern)
is more general than this story. The newly-drafted [[us006|rotate OAuth
client api-keys]] will need the *same* primitive — same overlap semantics,
same lock granularity, same versioned-alias bookkeeping. Worth surfacing
as a Feature-extraction candidate for the retro.
close_reason: AUDITED: APPROVED. rotate_secret meets all criteria.

title: Epic: rotate service credentials without downtime [sp001]
close_reason: Retro: rotate_secret + per-name versioned-alias bookkeeping shipped in vault.py. Rewrote im002 (## approach / ## data_model / ## api_surface to reflect _ALIASES + _LOCKS + VaultError surface). Updated ft002 (widened api_surface to include rotate_secret). No new ADRs; no us drafts beyond pre-existing us006. Candidate flagged: ft-extract 'rotate_secret + versioned-alias primitive' from im002 — would also serve us006 (rotate OAuth client api-keys). Decision deferred to human per vertical-over-horizontal default.
